title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster, addressing a critical weakness in vertical integration. The video argues that unlike other frontier labs, Anthropic relies heavily on external partners for chips, cloud, and infrastructure, and that the real competitive race is now centered on chips, energy, and datacenter control rather than just model benchmarks.
